review_scope: Review the state-first read-plane architecture slice against the new control/modules/state artifacts, module schemas, and issue #15 tracking scope.
questions: Is the read-state plane correctly primary over any general Git capability framing?
Are get_state and hydrate_state scoped narrowly enough for a first state.v1 contract?
Does the DAG keep ACP and Marimo in the correct downstream roles?
Is the dependency ordering sufficient before any wrapper, ACP, or Marimo implementation work begins?
